nodes.title: SETTINGS TROUBLESHOOT
CARRY MOTION TOGGLE FOR MOTION BRUSH
widgets_values:
How it behaves:
0 frames - preserves the clean anti-bleed guard.
16 frames - reaches the next segment boundary.
16+ frames: intentionally carries the motion guide into the next segment, creating the useful “length + x” behavior.

Use this to push Image X motion into Image X + 1 for interesting transitions.

Experiment with "Carry Motion" + "Matte" to create interesting transitions.

The "Carry Motion" settings are NOT global.  They must be adjusted for each target image in the timeline.

nodes.title: DO NOT BYPASS
widgets_values: Keep LoRA ic-lora-motion-track on for Retake Mode and Motion Brush.  Always keep "LTX Director Motion Brush V2 Guide Attention".  Bypassing these nodes will break ouput.

nodes.title: SWITCH OUTPUT TOGGLE
widgets_values:
Select Input1: Motion Tracking Output

Select Input2: Output uploaded Retake Mode video for comparison.

nodes.title: IMAGE STRENGTH
widgets_values:
How it behaves:
Strength applies to a single image seperately from the others in the timeline.  Reduce or increase strength of an image for stubborn generations that unintentionally skip a scene in your timeline.

Make sure "Carry Motion" is set to 0 for strict motion adherence to the intended scene, inhibiting "scene-transition motion-bleed", or "Carry Motion" behavior.

nodes.title: RETAKE MODE MANDATORY 6 SECOND MINIMUM
widgets_values: A minimum of 6-seconds sample is required to make meaningful changes in the uploaded video.  Therefore, you can sample no less than 6-seconds.  This is hardcoded into the node.

groups.title: UPSCALE Disabled by default for Low VRAM

subgraphs.name: Video Stitch
subgraphs.description: Stitches multiple video clips into a single sequential video file.
